steps.action: Created orchestrator-contract.ts with CheckTask, GateResult, CheckResult interfaces
Updated shared/src/index.ts barrel to export orchestrator-contract types
Added service bindings to orchestrator/wrangler.toml (FETCHER, PARSER, PROXY)
Implemented seven-gate funnel in orchestrator/src/index.ts with timed gate execution, service binding calls, and buildResult helper
Added queryDueTasks function for scheduled handler due-ness query
Added POST /check, POST /batch, and scheduled entry points

notes: Phase 3 depends on Phase 1 (schema) + Phase 2 (spoke workers). All service bindings reference workers created in Phase 2.
